title: 2PCS White Artificial Roses with Stems, single rose,Realistic Silk Flowers for Wedding, Bridal Shower, Home & Garden Decor
features: Package Includes – 2 white artificial roses, each measuring 50cm in length with a 10cm flower head, perfect for tabletop or decorative arrangements
Premium Material – Made of soft velvet for a realistic texture and natural appearance. Non-toxic, safe, and elegantly designed to mimic real roses
DIY Friendly – Flexible metal wire stem wrapped in plastic allows easy bending or trimming. Gently straighten any bends caused by packaging
Low Maintenance – Unlike real flowers, these artificial roses won’t wilt or fade. Simply dust them occasionally with a cloth or hairdryer to keep them fresh
Versatile Decor – Ideal for weddings, Valentine’s Day, anniversaries, and parties, these roses add a romantic touch to any setting
